import { existsSync, readFileSync } from 'fs';
import { resolve, join, relative, sep, basename } from 'path';
import { getLearningVaultRoot, getLearningRoot } from './lib/config.mjs';
import { readFolder, readNote } from './lib/frontmatter.mjs';
import { buildFrontmatter, writeNote, today as todayString } from './lib/markdown.mjs';

const SCRIPTS_DIR = import.meta.dirname;
const VAULT_ROOT = resolve(SCRIPTS_DIR, '..');
const LEARNING_VAULT_ROOT = getLearningVaultRoot();
const LEARNING_ROOT = getLearningRoot();
const DAILY_DIR = join(LEARNING_ROOT, '01_Daily');
const CHECKS_DIR = join(LEARNING_ROOT, '02_Checks');
const WILDCARDS_DIR = join(LEARNING_ROOT, '03_Wildcards');
const MASTERY_DIR = join(LEARNING_ROOT, '05_Mastery');
const TEMPLATES_DIR = join(LEARNING_ROOT, '06_Templates');
const PROJECTS_DIR = join(LEARNING_ROOT, '07_Projects');
const REVIEWS_DIR = join(LEARNING_ROOT, '08_Reviews');

export async function run(flags = {}) {
  const date = String(flags.date || todayString()).trim();
  const force = Boolean(flags.force);
  const weeklyReview = Boolean(flags['weekly-review']);
  const summary = { date, created: [], skipped: [], warnings: [] };

  const dailyPath = join(DAILY_DIR, `${date}.md`);
  const dailyNote = await ensureDailyNote(dailyPath, date, force, summary);
  const dailyData = dailyNote?.data || {};

  const discoveryTopics = toArray(dailyData.discovery_topics);
  const candidateNodes = toArray(dailyData.candidate_nodes);
  const sourceNotes = toArray(dailyData.source_notes);
  const systemConcepts = toArray(dailyData.system_concepts);
  const eventDomains = toArray(dailyData.event_domains);
  const clarityScore = Number(dailyData.clarity_score || extractInlineField(dailyNote?.content, 'clarity_score') || 0);

  const dailyCheckPath = join(CHECKS_DIR, `${date} Daily Check.md`);
  ensureNote(
    dailyCheckPath,
    buildDailyCheckNote({ date, dailyPath, discoveryTopics, candidateNodes, sourceNotes, systemConcepts }),
    force,
    summary,
    'Daily check'
  );

  const selectedTopic = pickSelectedTopic(flags, discoveryTopics);
  const topicId = normalizeNullable(flags['topic-id']);
  const masteryNote = topicId ? await findMasteryByTopicId(topicId) : null;
  const projectName = normalizeNullable(flags.project);

  if ((flags.candidate || flags.topic || flags['wildcard-topic']) && clarityScore < 2) {
    summary.warnings.push(`Daily note clarity score is ${clarityScore}; wildcard scaffolding usually waits for clarity >= 2.`);
  }

  let wildcardPath = null;
  let projectPath = null;

  if (selectedTopic) {
    const existingWildcard = await findExistingWildcard(date, selectedTopic);
    wildcardPath = existingWildcard || join(WILDCARDS_DIR, `${date} ${sanitizeFilenameSegment(selectedTopic, { keepSpaces: true })} Wildcard.md`);

    const projectTitle = projectName || inferProjectName(selectedTopic, masteryNote);
    if (projectTitle) {
      projectPath = join(PROJECTS_DIR, `${sanitizeFilenameSegment(projectTitle, { keepSpaces: true })}.md`);
      ensureNote(
        projectPath,
        buildProjectNote({
          date,
          projectTitle,
          wildcardPath,
          masteryNote,
          selectedTopic,
          sourceNotes,
          eventDomains,
          candidateNodes,
        }),
        force,
        summary,
        'Depth project'
      );
    }

    ensureNote(
      wildcardPath,
      buildWildcardNote({
        date,
        dailyPath,
        dailyCheckPath,
        selectedTopic,
        masteryNote,
        projectPath,
        sourceNotes,
        candidateNodes,
        originTrack: normalizeNullable(flags['origin-track']) || 'Discovery',
        focusQuestion: normalizeNullable(flags.question) || `Why does ${selectedTopic} deserve its own knowledge node?`,
      }),
      force,
      summary,
      'Wildcard'
    );

    if (topicId) {
      const existingKnowledgeCheck = await findExistingKnowledgeCheck(date, topicId);
      const knowledgeCheckPath = existingKnowledgeCheck || join(
        CHECKS_DIR,
        `${date} ${sanitizeFilenameSegment(masteryNote?.title || selectedTopic, { keepSpaces: true })} Knowledge Check.md`
      );
      ensureNote(
        knowledgeCheckPath,
        buildKnowledgeCheckNote({
          date,
          topicId,
          dailyPath,
          wildcardPath,
          masteryNote,
          projectPath,
          sourceNotes,
          selectedTopic,
        }),
        force,
        summary,
        'Knowledge check'
      );
    } else {
      summary.warnings.push('No --topic-id provided, so no knowledge check was scaffolded.');
    }
  }

  if (weeklyReview) {
    const weeklyPath = join(REVIEWS_DIR, `${date} Weekly Review.md`);
    ensureNote(
      weeklyPath,
      buildWeeklyReviewNote({ date, projectPath, eventDomains, discoveryTopics }),
      force,
      summary,
      'Weekly review'
    );
  }

  printSummary(summary, { dailyPath, selectedTopic, topicId });
  return summary;
}

async function ensureDailyNote(filePath, date, force, summary) {
  if (!force && existsSync(filePath)) {
    summary.skipped.push(`Daily note already exists: ${toVaultRelative(filePath)}`);
    return readNote(filePath);
  }

  const templatePath = join(TEMPLATES_DIR, 'Daily_Understanding.md');
  writeNote(filePath, materializeTemplate(templatePath, date));
  summary.created.push(`Daily note: ${toVaultRelative(filePath)}`);
  return readNote(filePath);
}

function ensureNote(filePath, content, force, summary, label) {
  if (!force && existsSync(filePath)) {
    summary.skipped.push(`${label} already exists: ${toVaultRelative(filePath)}`);
    return false;
  }
  writeNote(filePath, content);
  summary.created.push(`${label}: ${toVaultRelative(filePath)}`);
  return true;
}

function buildDailyCheckNote({ date, dailyPath, discoveryTopics, candidateNodes, sourceNotes, systemConcepts }) {
  const wildcardCandidates = discoveryTopics.slice(0, 3);
  const leadConcept = systemConcepts[0] || 'causality';
  const leadNode = candidateNodes[0] || 'the main chokepoint';
  const frontmatter = {
    template: 'daily_check',
    note_type: 'learning',
    check_type: 'daily',
    date,
    linked_daily: wikiLink(dailyPath),
    topic_id: '',
    linked_mastery: '',
    source_notes: sourceNotes.slice(0, 3),
    challenge_type: 'Cause Chain',
    unlock_target: 'wildcard',
    check_status: 'pending',
    tags: ['learning-system', 'check', 'daily-check'],
  };

  return [
    buildFrontmatter(frontmatter),
    '',
    `# Daily Check - ${date}`,
    '',
    `linked_daily:: ${wikiLink(dailyPath)}`,
    'topic_id:: ',
    'linked_mastery:: ',
    `source_notes:: ${joinLinks(sourceNotes.slice(0, 3))}`,
    'challenge_type:: Cause Chain',
    'unlock_target:: wildcard',
    'check_status:: pending',
    '',
    '## Purpose',
    '',
    '- Verify that the broad daily map is clear enough to support one focused wildcard.',
    '',
    '---',
    '',
    '## Prompt',
    '',
    `- Explain one clean cause chain from the daily note using ${leadNode}.`,
    `- Name the mechanism that matters most, using ${leadConcept} as the anchor.`,
    '- Pick the discovery topic that feels most worth exploring next.',
    '',
    '---',
    '',
    '## Your Answer',
    '',
    '- ',
    '',
    '---',
    '',
    '## Hints Used',
    '',
    '- L1: Start with the chokepoint or mechanism, not the headline.',
    '- L2: Separate direct effects from downstream effects.',
    '- L3: End with the open question that still matters.',
    '',
    '---',
    '',
    '## Self Score (1-5)',
    '',
    'score_clarity:: ',
    'score_mechanism:: ',
    'score_connection:: ',
    'score_confidence:: ',
    '',
    '---',
    '',
    '## What I Missed',
    '',
    '- ',
    '',
    '---',
    '',
    '## Wildcard Candidates',
    '',
    ...wildcardCandidates.map(topic => `- ${topic}`),
    ...(wildcardCandidates.length ? [] : ['- ']),
    '',
    '---',
    '',
    '## Gate Result',
    '',
    'gate_result:: Retry',
    `next_wildcard:: ${wildcardCandidates[0] || ''}`,
    '',
  ].join('\n');
}

function buildWildcardNote({ date, dailyPath, dailyCheckPath, selectedTopic, masteryNote, projectPath, sourceNotes, candidateNodes, originTrack, focusQuestion }) {
  const frontmatter = {
    template: 'wildcard',
    note_type: 'learning',
    date,
    linked_daily: wikiLink(dailyPath),
    linked_daily_check: wikiLink(dailyCheckPath),
    selected_topic: selectedTopic,
    linked_mastery: masteryNote ? wikiLink(masteryNote.path) : '',
    linked_project: projectPath ? wikiLink(projectPath) : '',
    originating_nodes: candidateNodes.slice(0, 3),
    source_notes: sourceNotes.slice(0, 3),
    origin_track: originTrack,
    focus_question: focusQuestion,
    timebox_minutes: 60,
    depth_signal: projectPath ? 'Queue' : 'Hold',
    tags: ['learning-system', 'wildcard'],
  };

  return [
    buildFrontmatter(frontmatter),
    '',
    `# Wildcard Board - ${date}`,
    '',
    `linked_daily:: ${wikiLink(dailyPath)}`,
    `linked_daily_check:: ${wikiLink(dailyCheckPath)}`,
    `selected_topic:: ${selectedTopic}`,
    `linked_mastery:: ${masteryNote ? wikiLink(masteryNote.path) : ''}`,
    `linked_project:: ${projectPath ? wikiLink(projectPath) : ''}`,
    `originating_nodes:: ${candidateNodes.slice(0, 3).join(', ')}`,
    `source_notes:: ${joinLinks(sourceNotes.slice(0, 3))}`,
    `origin_track:: ${originTrack}`,
    `focus_question:: ${focusQuestion}`,
    'timebox_minutes:: 60',
    `depth_signal:: ${projectPath ? 'Queue' : 'Hold'}`,
    '',
    '## Why This Topic',
    '',
    '- This topic survived the broad daily pass and deserves focused attention.',
    '- The goal is to turn one interesting thread into one reusable node with a real system connection.',
    '',
    '---',
    '',
    '## Track 1 - Current',
    '',
    `- What is happening right now that makes "${selectedTopic}" relevant?`,
    '',
    '---',
    '',
    '## Track 2 - Thesis',
    '',
    '- How does this topic change current thinking, priors, or live theses?',
    '',
    '---',
    '',
    '## Track 3 - Sector',
    '',
    '- Which sector, market, or domain expresses this topic most clearly?',
    '',
    '---',
    '',
    '## Track 4 - History',
    '',
    '- What historical regime, precedent, or pattern helps explain it?',
    '',
    '---',
    '',
    '## Track 5 - Project',
    '',
    `- ${projectPath ? 'This topic is pre-routed into the project queue for repeat review.' : 'Decide whether this should stay a note, become mastery evidence, or enter the project queue.'}`,
    '',
    '---',
    '',
    '## Knowledge Node',
    '',
    'What it is:',
    '',
    'How it works:',
    '',
    'Why it matters:',
    '',
    '1 connection:',
    '',
    '---',
    '',
    '## Insight',
    '',
    'insight:: ',
    '',
    '---',
    '',
    '## Project Signal',
    '',
    `project_signal:: ${projectPath ? 'Queue' : 'Hold'}`,
    'promotion_reason:: ',
    '',
    '---',
    '',
    '## Next Question',
    '',
    '- ',
    '',
  ].join('\n');
}

function buildKnowledgeCheckNote({ date, topicId, dailyPath, wildcardPath, masteryNote, projectPath, sourceNotes, selectedTopic }) {
  const title = masteryNote?.title || selectedTopic;
  const frontmatter = {
    template: 'knowledge_check',
    note_type: 'learning',
    check_type: 'knowledge',
    date,
    topic_id: topicId,
    linked_mastery: masteryNote ? wikiLink(masteryNote.path) : '',
    linked_daily: wikiLink(dailyPath),
    linked_wildcard: wikiLink(wildcardPath),
    linked_project: projectPath ? wikiLink(projectPath) : '',
    source_notes: sourceNotes.slice(0, 3),
    challenge_type: 'Scenario',
    unlock_target: 'depth_project',
    check_status: 'pending',
    project_decision: projectPath ? 'Queue' : 'Hold',
    tags: ['learning-system', 'check', 'knowledge-check'],
  };

  return [
    buildFrontmatter(frontmatter),
    '',
    `# Knowledge Check - ${date}`,
    '',
    `topic_id:: ${topicId}`,
    `linked_mastery:: ${masteryNote ? wikiLink(masteryNote.path) : ''}`,
    `linked_daily:: ${wikiLink(dailyPath)}`,
    `linked_wildcard:: ${wikiLink(wildcardPath)}`,
    `linked_project:: ${projectPath ? wikiLink(projectPath) : ''}`,
    `source_notes:: ${joinLinks(sourceNotes.slice(0, 3))}`,
    'challenge_type:: Scenario',
    'unlock_target:: depth_project',
    'check_status:: pending',
    `project_decision:: ${projectPath ? 'Queue' : 'Hold'}`,
    '',
    '## Topic',
    '',
    `- ${title}`,
    '',
    '---',
    '',
    '## Challenge Type',
    '',
    '- Scenario',
    '',
    '---',
    '',
    '## Prompt',
    '',
    `- Using the wildcard on "${selectedTopic}", explain the core mechanism in plain language.`,
    '- Name what would strengthen the explanation.',
    '- Name what would break the explanation.',
    '',
    '---',
    '',
    '## Your Answer',
    '',
    '- ',
    '',
    '---',
    '',
    '## Hints Used',
    '',
    '- L1: Start with the main mechanism, not the conclusion.',
    '- L2: Name the transmission path or decision path explicitly.',
    '- L3: Include one disconfirming signal.',
    '',
    '---',
    '',
    '## Self Score (1-5)',
    '',
    'score_clarity:: ',
    'score_mechanism:: ',
    'score_connection:: ',
    'score_confidence:: ',
    '',
    '---',
    '',
    '## What I Missed',
    '',
    '- ',
    '',
    '---',
    '',
    '## Node Updated',
    '',
    `node_updated:: ${title}`,
    '',
    '---',
    '',
    '## Mastery Update',
    '',
    'mastery_before:: ',
    'mastery_after:: ',
    '',
    '---',
    '',
    '## Project Decision',
    '',
    '- Hold',
    '- Queue',
    '- Promote',
    '',
    `project_decision:: ${projectPath ? 'Queue' : 'Hold'}`,
    '',
  ].join('\n');
}

function buildProjectNote({ date, projectTitle, wildcardPath, masteryNote, selectedTopic, sourceNotes, eventDomains, candidateNodes }) {
  const frontmatter = {
    template: 'depth_project',
    note_type: 'learning',
    date_created: date,
    project_status: 'queued',
    origin_wildcards: [wikiLink(wildcardPath)],
    connected_mastery: masteryNote ? [wikiLink(masteryNote.path)] : [],
    connected_systems: eventDomains.slice(0, 4),
    signals_to_track: candidateNodes.slice(0, 4),
    core_nodes: candidateNodes.slice(0, 3),
    progress_level: 0,
    last_updated: date,
    tags: ['learning-system', 'project'],
  };

  return [
    buildFrontmatter(frontmatter),
    '',
    `# Project: ${projectTitle}`,
    '',
    'project_status:: queued',
    `origin_wildcards:: ${wikiLink(wildcardPath)}`,
    `connected_mastery:: ${masteryNote ? wikiLink(masteryNote.path) : ''}`,
    `connected_systems:: ${eventDomains.slice(0, 4).join(', ')}`,
    `signals_to_track:: ${candidateNodes.slice(0, 4).join(', ')}`,
    `core_nodes:: ${candidateNodes.slice(0, 3).join(', ')}`,
    'progress_level:: 0',
    `last_updated:: ${date}`,
    '',
    '## Goal',
    '',
    `- Compound the learning thread around "${selectedTopic}" until it becomes an explainable system, not just a good note.`,
    '',
    '---',
    '',
    '## Why It Matters',
    '',
    '- This project exists because the topic is recurring, connected, or still unresolved.',
    '',
    '---',
    '',
    '## Connected Systems',
    '',
    ...eventDomains.slice(0, 4).map(item => `- ${item}`),
    ...(eventDomains.length ? [] : ['- ']),
    '',
    '---',
    '',
    '## Signals to Track',
    '',
    ...sourceNotes.slice(0, 3).map(item => `- ${item}`),
    ...(sourceNotes.length ? [] : ['- ']),
    '',
    '---',
    '',
    '## Core Knowledge Nodes',
    '',
    ...candidateNodes.slice(0, 3).map(item => `- ${item}`),
    ...(candidateNodes.length ? [] : ['- ']),
    '',
    '---',
    '',
    '## Open Questions',
    '',
    '- What evidence would upgrade this from a queued project to the active project?',
    '- Which connected system matters most and why?',
    '',
    '---',
    '',
    '## Progress',
    '',
    'Level:',
    'Last Updated:',
    '',
    '---',
    '',
    '## Notes',
    '',
    '- ',
    '',
  ].join('\n');
}

function buildWeeklyReviewNote({ date, projectPath, eventDomains, discoveryTopics }) {
  const frontmatter = {
    template: 'weekly_review',
    note_type: 'learning',
    review_date: date,
    macro_covered: eventDomains.includes('Inflation') || eventDomains.includes('Policy') || eventDomains.includes('Macro'),
    slow_sector_covered: eventDomains.includes('Food Systems') || eventDomains.includes('Supply Chains'),
    frontier_covered: eventDomains.includes('AI'),
    behavioral_covered: false,
    active_project: '',
    stale_areas: [],
    priority_gaps: discoveryTopics.slice(0, 3),
    tags: ['learning-system', 'weekly-review'],
  };

  return [
    buildFrontmatter(frontmatter),
    '',
    `# Weekly Review - ${date}`,
    '',
    `review_date:: ${date}`,
    `macro_covered:: ${frontmatter.macro_covered}`,
    `slow_sector_covered:: ${frontmatter.slow_sector_covered}`,
    `frontier_covered:: ${frontmatter.frontier_covered}`,
    'behavioral_covered:: false',
    'active_project:: ',
    'stale_areas:: ',
    `priority_gaps:: ${discoveryTopics.slice(0, 3).join(', ')}`,
    '',
    '## What Systems Am I Missing?',
    '',
    '- Which domain still feels under-read or under-tested?',
    '',
    '---',
    '',
    '## Coverage Check',
    '',
    `- Macro: ${frontmatter.macro_covered ? 'Seen this week' : 'Needs work'}`,
    `- Slow sector: ${frontmatter.slow_sector_covered ? 'Seen this week' : 'Needs work'}`,
    `- Frontier topic: ${frontmatter.frontier_covered ? 'Seen this week' : 'Needs work'}`,
    '- Behavioral trend: Needs work',
    '',
    '---',
    '',
    '## Project State',
    '',
    `- Active project: ${projectPath ? 'None yet; queued candidate exists' : 'None'}`,
    `- Queue health: ${projectPath ? wikiLink(projectPath) : 'No queued projects yet'}`,
    '- Promotion candidates: Review the strongest wildcard from the week',
    '',
    '---',
    '',
    '## Stale Areas',
    '',
    '- ',
    '',
    '---',
    '',
    '## Next Adjustments',
    '',
    '- Fill the behavioral gap next week.',
    '- Decide whether the queued project deserves active status.',
    '',
  ].join('\n');
}

function printSummary(summary, context) {
  console.log('\nLearning Session Scaffold');
  console.log('========================');
  console.log(`Date: ${summary.date}`);
  console.log(`Daily note: ${toVaultRelative(context.dailyPath)}`);
  if (context.selectedTopic) console.log(`Selected wildcard topic: ${context.selectedTopic}`);
  if (context.topicId) console.log(`Mastery topic: ${context.topicId}`);

  if (summary.created.length) {
    console.log('\nCreated:');
    for (const item of summary.created) console.log(`  - ${item}`);
  }

  if (summary.skipped.length) {
    console.log('\nSkipped:');
    for (const item of summary.skipped) console.log(`  - ${item}`);
  }

  if (summary.warnings.length) {
    console.log('\nWarnings:');
    for (const item of summary.warnings) console.log(`  - ${item}`);
  }

  console.log('\nNext: complete the daily check, pick the wildcard, then answer at least one knowledge check.');
}

function materializeTemplate(templatePath, date) {
  return readFileSync(templatePath, 'utf-8').replace(/\{\{date\}\}/g, date);
}

async function findMasteryByTopicId(topicId) {
  const notes = await readFolder(MASTERY_DIR, false);
  for (const note of notes) {
    if (String(note?.data?.topic_id || '').trim() !== topicId) continue;
    return {
      path: note.path,
      title: basename(note.filename, '.md'),
      data: note.data,
    };
  }
  return null;
}

async function findExistingWildcard(date, selectedTopic) {
  const notes = await readFolder(WILDCARDS_DIR, false);
  for (const note of notes) {
    if (String(note?.data?.date || '').trim() !== date) continue;
    if (String(note?.data?.selected_topic || '').trim() !== selectedTopic) continue;
    return note.path;
  }
  return null;
}

async function findExistingKnowledgeCheck(date, topicId) {
  const notes = await readFolder(CHECKS_DIR, false);
  for (const note of notes) {
    if (String(note?.data?.date || '').trim() !== date) continue;
    if (String(note?.data?.check_type || '').trim() !== 'knowledge') continue;
    if (String(note?.data?.topic_id || '').trim() !== topicId) continue;
    return note.path;
  }
  return null;
}

function pickSelectedTopic(flags, discoveryTopics) {
  const explicit = normalizeNullable(flags['wildcard-topic']) || normalizeNullable(flags.topic);
  if (explicit) return explicit;

  if (flags.candidate) {
    const index = Number(flags.candidate);
    if (Number.isInteger(index) && index >= 1 && index <= discoveryTopics.length) {
      return discoveryTopics[index - 1];
    }
  }

  return null;
}

function inferProjectName(selectedTopic, masteryNote) {
  if (masteryNote?.title) return masteryNote.title;
  return selectedTopic;
}

function wikiLink(filePath) {
  return `[[${toVaultRelative(filePath).replace(/\.md$/i, '')}]]`;
}

function toVaultRelative(filePath) {
  return relative(VAULT_ROOT, filePath).split(sep).join('/');
}

function toArray(value) {
  if (Array.isArray(value)) return value.filter(Boolean).map(v => String(v).trim()).filter(Boolean);
  if (value === null || value === undefined) return [];
  const raw = String(value).trim();
  if (!raw) return [];
  return raw.split(',').map(part => part.trim()).filter(Boolean);
}

function joinLinks(items) {
  return items.join(', ');
}

function normalizeNullable(value) {
  if (value === null || value === undefined) return null;
  const text = String(value).trim();
  return text || null;
}

function extractInlineField(content, fieldName) {
  if (!content) return null;
  const match = content.match(new RegExp(`^${fieldName}::\\s*(.+)$`, 'm'));
  return match ? match[1].trim() : null;
}

function sanitizeFilenameSegment(value, options = {}) {
  const { keepSpaces = false } = options;
  const normalized = String(value)
    .replace(/[<>:"/\\|?*]+/g, ' ')
    .replace(/\s+/g, keepSpaces ? ' ' : '_')
    .replace(/_+/g, '_')
    .trim();
  return normalized || 'Untitled';
}

import { existsSync, readFileSync } from 'fs';
import { resolve, join, relative, sep, basename } from 'path';
import { readFolder, readNote } from './lib/frontmatter.mjs';
import { buildFrontmatter, writeNote, today as todayString } from './lib/markdown.mjs';

const SCRIPTS_DIR = import.meta.dirname;
const VAULT_ROOT = resolve(SCRIPTS_DIR, '..');
const LEARNING_ROOT = join(VAULT_ROOT, '11_Learning');
const DAILY_DIR = join(LEARNING_ROOT, '01_Daily');
const CHECKS_DIR = join(LEARNING_ROOT, '02_Checks');
const WILDCARDS_DIR = join(LEARNING_ROOT, '03_Wildcards');
const MASTERY_DIR = join(LEARNING_ROOT, '05_Mastery');
const TEMPLATES_DIR = join(LEARNING_ROOT, '06_Templates');
const PROJECTS_DIR = join(LEARNING_ROOT, '07_Projects');
const REVIEWS_DIR = join(LEARNING_ROOT, '08_Reviews');

export async function run(flags = {}) {
  const date = String(flags.date || todayString()).trim();
  const force = Boolean(flags.force);
  const weeklyReview = Boolean(flags['weekly-review']);
  const summary = { date, created: [], skipped: [], warnings: [] };

  const dailyPath = join(DAILY_DIR, `${date}.md`);
  const dailyNote = await ensureDailyNote(dailyPath, date, force, summary);
  const dailyData = dailyNote?.data || {};

  const discoveryTopics = toArray(dailyData.discovery_topics);
  const candidateNodes = toArray(dailyData.candidate_nodes);
  const sourceNotes = toArray(dailyData.source_notes);
  const systemConcepts = toArray(dailyData.system_concepts);
  const eventDomains = toArray(dailyData.event_domains);
  const clarityScore = Number(dailyData.clarity_score || extractInlineField(dailyNote?.content, 'clarity_score') || 0);

  const dailyCheckPath = join(CHECKS_DIR, `${date} Daily Check.md`);
  ensureNote(
    dailyCheckPath,
    buildDailyCheckNote({ date, dailyPath, discoveryTopics, candidateNodes, sourceNotes, systemConcepts }),
    force,
    summary,
    'Daily check'
  );

  const selectedTopic = pickSelectedTopic(flags, discoveryTopics);
  const topicId = normalizeNullable(flags['topic-id']);
  const masteryNote = topicId ? await findMasteryByTopicId(topicId) : null;
  const projectName = normalizeNullable(flags.project);

  if ((flags.candidate || flags.topic || flags['wildcard-topic']) && clarityScore < 2) {
    summary.warnings.push(`Daily note clarity score is ${clarityScore}; wildcard scaffolding usually waits for clarity >= 2.`);
  }

  let wildcardPath = null;
  let projectPath = null;

  if (selectedTopic) {
    const existingWildcard = await findExistingWildcard(date, selectedTopic);
    wildcardPath = existingWildcard || join(WILDCARDS_DIR, `${date} ${sanitizeFilenameSegment(selectedTopic, { keepSpaces: true })} Wildcard.md`);

    const projectTitle = projectName || inferProjectName(selectedTopic, masteryNote);
    if (projectTitle) {
      projectPath = join(PROJECTS_DIR, `${sanitizeFilenameSegment(projectTitle, { keepSpaces: true })}.md`);
      ensureNote(
        projectPath,
        buildProjectNote({
          date,
          projectTitle,
          wildcardPath,
          masteryNote,
          selectedTopic,
          sourceNotes,
          eventDomains,
          candidateNodes,
        }),
        force,
        summary,
        'Depth project'
      );
    }

    ensureNote(
      wildcardPath,
      buildWildcardNote({
        date,
        dailyPath,
        dailyCheckPath,
        selectedTopic,
        masteryNote,
        projectPath,
        sourceNotes,
        candidateNodes,
        originTrack: normalizeNullable(flags['origin-track']) || 'Discovery',
        focusQuestion: normalizeNullable(flags.question) || `Why does ${selectedTopic} deserve its own knowledge node?`,
      }),
      force,
      summary,
      'Wildcard'
    );

    if (topicId) {
      const existingKnowledgeCheck = await findExistingKnowledgeCheck(date, topicId);
      const knowledgeCheckPath = existingKnowledgeCheck || join(
        CHECKS_DIR,
        `${date} ${sanitizeFilenameSegment(masteryNote?.title || selectedTopic, { keepSpaces: true })} Knowledge Check.md`
      );
      ensureNote(
        knowledgeCheckPath,
        buildKnowledgeCheckNote({
          date,
          topicId,
          dailyPath,
          wildcardPath,
          masteryNote,
          projectPath,
          sourceNotes,
          selectedTopic,
        }),
        force,
        summary,
        'Knowledge check'
      );
    } else {
      summary.warnings.push('No --topic-id provided, so no knowledge check was scaffolded.');
    }
  }

  if (weeklyReview) {
    const weeklyPath = join(REVIEWS_DIR, `${date} Weekly Review.md`);
    ensureNote(
      weeklyPath,
      buildWeeklyReviewNote({ date, projectPath, eventDomains, discoveryTopics }),
      force,
      summary,
      'Weekly review'
    );
  }

  printSummary(summary, { dailyPath, selectedTopic, topicId });
  return summary;
}

async function ensureDailyNote(filePath, date, force, summary) {
  if (!force && existsSync(filePath)) {
    summary.skipped.push(`Daily note already exists: ${toVaultRelative(filePath)}`);
    return readNote(filePath);
  }

  const templatePath = join(TEMPLATES_DIR, 'Daily_Understanding.md');
  writeNote(filePath, materializeTemplate(templatePath, date));
  summary.created.push(`Daily note: ${toVaultRelative(filePath)}`);
  return readNote(filePath);
}

function ensureNote(filePath, content, force, summary, label) {
  if (!force && existsSync(filePath)) {
    summary.skipped.push(`${label} already exists: ${toVaultRelative(filePath)}`);
    return false;
  }
  writeNote(filePath, content);
  summary.created.push(`${label}: ${toVaultRelative(filePath)}`);
  return true;
}

function buildDailyCheckNote({ date, dailyPath, discoveryTopics, candidateNodes, sourceNotes, systemConcepts }) {
  const wildcardCandidates = discoveryTopics.slice(0, 3);
  const leadConcept = systemConcepts[0] || 'causality';
  const leadNode = candidateNodes[0] || 'the main chokepoint';
  const frontmatter = {
    template: 'daily_check',
    note_type: 'learning',
    check_type: 'daily',
    date,
    linked_daily: wikiLink(dailyPath),
    topic_id: '',
    linked_mastery: '',
    source_notes: sourceNotes.slice(0, 3),
    challenge_type: 'Cause Chain',
    unlock_target: 'wildcard',
    check_status: 'pending',
    tags: ['learning-system', 'check', 'daily-check'],
  };

  return [
    buildFrontmatter(frontmatter),
    '',
    `# Daily Check - ${date}`,
    '',
    `linked_daily:: ${wikiLink(dailyPath)}`,
    'topic_id:: ',
    'linked_mastery:: ',
    `source_notes:: ${joinLinks(sourceNotes.slice(0, 3))}`,
    'challenge_type:: Cause Chain',
    'unlock_target:: wildcard',
    'check_status:: pending',
    '',
    '## Purpose',
    '',
    '- Verify that the broad daily map is clear enough to support one focused wildcard.',
    '',
    '---',
    '',
    '## Prompt',
    '',
    `- Explain one clean cause chain from the daily note using ${leadNode}.`,
    `- Name the mechanism that matters most, using ${leadConcept} as the anchor.`,
    '- Pick the discovery topic that feels most worth exploring next.',
    '',
    '---',
    '',
    '## Your Answer',
    '',
    '- ',
    '',
    '---',
    '',
    '## Hints Used',
    '',
    '- L1: Start with the chokepoint or mechanism, not the headline.',
    '- L2: Separate direct effects from downstream effects.',
    '- L3: End with the open question that still matters.',
    '',
    '---',
    '',
    '## Self Score (1-5)',
    '',
    'score_clarity:: ',
    'score_mechanism:: ',
    'score_connection:: ',
    'score_confidence:: ',
    '',
    '---',
    '',
    '## What I Missed',
    '',
    '- ',
    '',
    '---',
    '',
    '## Wildcard Candidates',
    '',
    ...wildcardCandidates.map(topic => `- ${topic}`),
    ...(wildcardCandidates.length ? [] : ['- ']),
    '',
    '---',
    '',
    '## Gate Result',
    '',
    'gate_result:: Retry',
    `next_wildcard:: ${wildcardCandidates[0] || ''}`,
    '',
  ].join('\n');
}

function buildWildcardNote({ date, dailyPath, dailyCheckPath, selectedTopic, masteryNote, projectPath, sourceNotes, candidateNodes, originTrack, focusQuestion }) {
  const frontmatter = {
    template: 'wildcard',
    note_type: 'learning',
    date,
    linked_daily: wikiLink(dailyPath),
    linked_daily_check: wikiLink(dailyCheckPath),
    selected_topic: selectedTopic,
    linked_mastery: masteryNote ? wikiLink(masteryNote.path) : '',
    linked_project: projectPath ? wikiLink(projectPath) : '',
    originating_nodes: candidateNodes.slice(0, 3),
    source_notes: sourceNotes.slice(0, 3),
    origin_track: originTrack,
    focus_question: focusQuestion,
    timebox_minutes: 60,

  return [

    `selected_topic:: ${selectedTopic}`,

    `linked_project:: ${projectPath ? wikiLink(projectPath) : ''}`,

    `source_notes:: ${joinLinks(sourceNotes.slice(0, 3))}`,
    `origin_track:: ${originTrack}`,

    'timebox_minutes:: 60',
    `depth_signal:: ${projectPath ? 'Queue' : 'Hold'}`,

    '',

    '',
    '---',

    '',

    '',
    '---',

    '## Track 5 - Project',
    '',
    `- ${projectPath ? 'This topic is pre-routed into the project queue for repeat review.' : 'Decide whether this should stay a note, become mastery evidence, or enter the project queue.'}`,
    '',
    '---',
    '',
    '## Knowledge Node',
    '',
    'What it is:',
    '',
    'How it works:',
    '',
    'Why it matters:',
    '',
    '1 connection:',
    '',
    '---',

    '## Insight',

    'insight:: ',

    '## Project Signal',

    `project_signal:: ${projectPath ? 'Queue' : 'Hold'}`,
    'promotion_reason:: ',

}

function buildKnowledgeCheckNote({ date, topicId, dailyPath, wildcardPath, masteryNote, projectPath, sourceNotes, selectedTopic }) {
  const title = masteryNote?.title || selectedTopic;
  const frontmatter = {
    template: 'knowledge_check',
    note_type: 'learning',
    check_type: 'knowledge',
    date,
    topic_id: topicId,
    linked_mastery: masteryNote ? wikiLink(masteryNote.path) : '',
    linked_daily: wikiLink(dailyPath),
    linked_wildcard: wikiLink(wildcardPath),
    linked_project: projectPath ? wikiLink(projectPath) : '',
    source_notes: sourceNotes.slice(0, 3),
    challenge_type: 'Scenario',
    unlock_target: 'depth_project',

  return [

    `linked_daily:: ${wikiLink(dailyPath)}`,
    `linked_wildcard:: ${wikiLink(wildcardPath)}`,
    `linked_project:: ${projectPath ? wikiLink(projectPath) : ''}`,
    `source_notes:: ${joinLinks(sourceNotes.slice(0, 3))}`,
    'challenge_type:: Scenario',
    'unlock_target:: depth_project',
    'check_status:: pending',
    `project_decision:: ${projectPath ? 'Queue' : 'Hold'}`,
    '',
    '## Topic',
    '',
    `- ${title}`,
    '',
    '---',
    '',

    '- Scenario',

    '---',
    '',
    '## Prompt',
    '',
    `- Using the wildcard on "${selectedTopic}", explain the core mechanism in plain language.`,
    '- Name what would strengthen the explanation.',
    '- Name what would break the explanation.',
    '',
    '---',
    '',
    '## Your Answer',

    '- ',

    '---',

    '- L2: Name the transmission path or decision path explicitly.',
    '- L3: Include one disconfirming signal.',
    '',
    '---',
    '',
    '## Self Score (1-5)',
    '',
    'score_clarity:: ',
    'score_mechanism:: ',
    'score_connection:: ',
    'score_confidence:: ',
    '',
    '---',
    '',
    '## What I Missed',
    '',
    '- ',

    '',
    `node_updated:: ${title}`,

    '',
    'mastery_before:: ',
    'mastery_after:: ',
    '',
    '---',

    '',

}

function buildProjectNote({ date, projectTitle, wildcardPath, masteryNote, selectedTopic, sourceNotes, eventDomains, candidateNodes }) {
  const frontmatter = {
    template: 'depth_project',
    note_type: 'learning',
    date_created: date,
    project_status: 'queued',
    origin_wildcards: [wikiLink(wildcardPath)],
    connected_mastery: masteryNote ? [wikiLink(masteryNote.path)] : [],
    connected_systems: eventDomains.slice(0, 4),
    signals_to_track: candidateNodes.slice(0, 4),

  return [

    `signals_to_track:: ${candidateNodes.slice(0, 4).join(', ')}`,
    `core_nodes:: ${candidateNodes.slice(0, 3).join(', ')}`,
    'progress_level:: 0',
    `last_updated:: ${date}`,

    ...sourceNotes.slice(0, 3).map(item => `- ${item}`),
    ...(sourceNotes.length ? [] : ['- ']),

    ...(candidateNodes.length ? [] : ['- ']),

function buildWeeklyReviewNote({ date, projectPath, eventDomains, discoveryTopics }) {
  const frontmatter = {
    template: 'weekly_review',
    note_type: 'learning',
    review_date: date,
    macro_covered: eventDomains.includes('Inflation') || eventDomains.includes('Policy') || eventDomains.includes('Macro'),
    slow_sector_covered: eventDomains.includes('Food Systems') || eventDomains.includes('Supply Chains'),
    frontier_covered: eventDomains.includes('AI'),
    behavioral_covered: false,
    active_project: '',
    stale_areas: [],
    priority_gaps: discoveryTopics.slice(0, 3),
    tags: ['learning-system', 'weekly-review'],
  };

  return [
    buildFrontmatter(frontmatter),
    '',
    `# Weekly Review - ${date}`,
    '',
    `review_date:: ${date}`,
    `macro_covered:: ${frontmatter.macro_covered}`,
    `slow_sector_covered:: ${frontmatter.slow_sector_covered}`,
    `frontier_covered:: ${frontmatter.frontier_covered}`,
    'behavioral_covered:: false',
    'active_project:: ',
    'stale_areas:: ',
    `priority_gaps:: ${discoveryTopics.slice(0, 3).join(', ')}`,
    '',
    '## What Systems Am I Missing?',
    '',
    '- Which domain still feels under-read or under-tested?',
    '',
    '---',
    '',
    '## Coverage Check',
    '',
    `- Macro: ${frontmatter.macro_covered ? 'Seen this week' : 'Needs work'}`,
    `- Slow sector: ${frontmatter.slow_sector_covered ? 'Seen this week' : 'Needs work'}`,
    `- Frontier topic: ${frontmatter.frontier_covered ? 'Seen this week' : 'Needs work'}`,
    '- Behavioral trend: Needs work',
    '',
    '---',
    '',
    '## Project State',
    '',
    `- Active project: ${projectPath ? 'None yet; queued candidate exists' : 'None'}`,
    `- Queue health: ${projectPath ? wikiLink(projectPath) : 'No queued projects yet'}`,
    '- Promotion candidates: Review the strongest wildcard from the week',
    '',
    '---',
    '',
    '## Stale Areas',
    '',
    '- ',
    '',
    '---',
    '',
    '## Next Adjustments',
    '',
    '- Fill the behavioral gap next week.',
    '- Decide whether the queued project deserves active status.',
    '',
  ].join('\n');
}

function printSummary(summary, context) {
  console.log('\nLearning Session Scaffold');
  console.log('========================');
  console.log(`Date: ${summary.date}`);
  console.log(`Daily note: ${toVaultRelative(context.dailyPath)}`);
  if (context.selectedTopic) console.log(`Selected wildcard topic: ${context.selectedTopic}`);
  if (context.topicId) console.log(`Mastery topic: ${context.topicId}`);

  if (summary.created.length) {
    console.log('\nCreated:');
    for (const item of summary.created) console.log(`  - ${item}`);
  }

  if (summary.skipped.length) {
    console.log('\nSkipped:');
    for (const item of summary.skipped) console.log(`  - ${item}`);
  }

  if (summary.warnings.length) {
    console.log('\nWarnings:');
    for (const item of summary.warnings) console.log(`  - ${item}`);
  }

  console.log('\nNext: complete the daily check, pick the wildcard, then answer at least one knowledge check.');
}

function materializeTemplate(templatePath, date) {
  return readFileSync(templatePath, 'utf-8').replace(/\{\{date\}\}/g, date);
}

async function findMasteryByTopicId(topicId) {
  const notes = await readFolder(MASTERY_DIR, false);
  for (const note of notes) {
    if (String(note?.data?.topic_id || '').trim() !== topicId) continue;
    return {
      path: note.path,
      title: basename(note.filename, '.md'),
      data: note.data,
    };
  }
  return null;
}

async function findExistingWildcard(date, selectedTopic) {
  const notes = await readFolder(WILDCARDS_DIR, false);
  for (const note of notes) {
    if (String(note?.data?.date || '').trim() !== date) continue;
    if (String(note?.data?.selected_topic || '').trim() !== selectedTopic) continue;
    return note.path;
  }
  return null;
}

async function findExistingKnowledgeCheck(date, topicId) {
  const notes = await readFolder(CHECKS_DIR, false);
  for (const note of notes) {
    if (String(note?.data?.date || '').trim() !== date) continue;
    if (String(note?.data?.check_type || '').trim() !== 'knowledge') continue;
    if (String(note?.data?.topic_id || '').trim() !== topicId) continue;
    return note.path;
  }
  return null;
}

function pickSelectedTopic(flags, discoveryTopics) {
  const explicit = normalizeNullable(flags['wildcard-topic']) || normalizeNullable(flags.topic);
  if (explicit) return explicit;

  if (flags.candidate) {
    const index = Number(flags.candidate);
    if (Number.isInteger(index) && index >= 1 && index <= discoveryTopics.length) {
      return discoveryTopics[index - 1];
    }
  }

  return null;
}

function inferProjectName(selectedTopic, masteryNote) {
  if (masteryNote?.title) return masteryNote.title;
  return selectedTopic;
}

function wikiLink(filePath) {
  return `[[${toVaultRelative(filePath).replace(/\.md$/i, '')}]]`;
}

function toVaultRelative(filePath) {
  return relative(VAULT_ROOT, filePath).split(sep).join('/');
}

function toArray(value) {
  if (Array.isArray(value)) return value.filter(Boolean).map(v => String(v).trim()).filter(Boolean);
  if (value === null || value === undefined) return [];
  const raw = String(value).trim();
  if (!raw) return [];
  return raw.split(',').map(part => part.trim()).filter(Boolean);
}

function joinLinks(items) {
  return items.join(', ');
}

function normalizeNullable(value) {
  if (value === null || value === undefined) return null;
  const text = String(value).trim();
  return text || null;
}

function extractInlineField(content, fieldName) {
  if (!content) return null;
  const match = content.match(new RegExp(`^${fieldName}::\\s*(.+)$`, 'm'));
  return match ? match[1].trim() : null;
}

function sanitizeFilenameSegment(value, options = {}) {
  const { keepSpaces = false } = options;
  const normalized = String(value)
    .replace(/[<>:"/\\|?*]+/g, ' ')
    .replace(/\s+/g, keepSpaces ? ' ' : '_')
    .replace(/_+/g, '_')
    .trim();
  return normalized || 'Untitled';
}

import { existsSync, readFileSync } from 'fs';
import { resolve, join, relative, sep, basename } from 'path';
import { getLearningVaultRoot, getLearningRoot } from './lib/config.mjs';
import { readFolder, readNote } from './lib/frontmatter.mjs';
import { buildFrontmatter, writeNote, today as todayString } from './lib/markdown.mjs';

const SCRIPTS_DIR = import.meta.dirname;
const VAULT_ROOT = resolve(SCRIPTS_DIR, '..');
const LEARNING_VAULT_ROOT = getLearningVaultRoot();
const LEARNING_ROOT = getLearningRoot();
const DAILY_DIR = join(LEARNING_ROOT, '01_Daily');
const CHECKS_DIR = join(LEARNING_ROOT, '02_Checks');
const WILDCARDS_DIR = join(LEARNING_ROOT, '03_Wildcards');
const MASTERY_DIR = join(LEARNING_ROOT, '05_Mastery');
const TEMPLATES_DIR = join(LEARNING_ROOT, '06_Templates');
const PROJECTS_DIR = join(LEARNING_ROOT, '07_Projects');
const REVIEWS_DIR = join(LEARNING_ROOT, '08_Reviews');

export async function run(flags = {}) {
  const date = String(flags.date || todayString()).trim();
  const force = Boolean(flags.force);
  const weeklyReview = Boolean(flags['weekly-review']);
  const summary = { date, created: [], skipped: [], warnings: [] };

  const dailyPath = join(DAILY_DIR, `${date}.md`);
  const dailyNote = await ensureDailyNote(dailyPath, date, force, summary);
  const dailyData = dailyNote?.data || {};

  const discoveryTopics = toArray(dailyData.discovery_topics);
  const candidateNodes = toArray(dailyData.candidate_nodes);
  const sourceNotes = toArray(dailyData.source_notes);
  const systemConcepts = toArray(dailyData.system_concepts);
  const eventDomains = toArray(dailyData.event_domains);
  const clarityScore = Number(dailyData.clarity_score || extractInlineField(dailyNote?.content, 'clarity_score') || 0);

  const dailyCheckPath = join(CHECKS_DIR, `${date} Daily Check.md`);
  ensureNote(
    dailyCheckPath,
    buildDailyCheckNote({ date, dailyPath, discoveryTopics, candidateNodes, sourceNotes, systemConcepts }),
    force,
    summary,
    'Daily check'
  );

  const selectedTopic = pickSelectedTopic(flags, discoveryTopics);
  const topicId = normalizeNullable(flags['topic-id']);
  const masteryNote = topicId ? await findMasteryByTopicId(topicId) : null;
  const projectName = normalizeNullable(flags.project);

  if ((flags.candidate || flags.topic || flags['wildcard-topic']) && clarityScore < 2) {
    summary.warnings.push(`Daily note clarity score is ${clarityScore}; wildcard scaffolding usually waits for clarity >= 2.`);
  }

  let wildcardPath = null;
  let projectPath = null;

  if (selectedTopic) {
    const existingWildcard = await findExistingWildcard(date, selectedTopic);
    wildcardPath = existingWildcard || join(WILDCARDS_DIR, `${date} ${sanitizeFilenameSegment(selectedTopic, { keepSpaces: true })} Wildcard.md`);

    const projectTitle = projectName || inferProjectName(selectedTopic, masteryNote);
    if (projectTitle) {
      projectPath = join(PROJECTS_DIR, `${sanitizeFilenameSegment(projectTitle, { keepSpaces: true })}.md`);
      ensureNote(
        projectPath,
        buildProjectNote({
          date,
          projectTitle,
          wildcardPath,
          masteryNote,
          selectedTopic,
          sourceNotes,
          eventDomains,
          candidateNodes,
        }),
        force,
        summary,
        'Depth project'
      );
    }

    ensureNote(
      wildcardPath,
      buildWildcardNote({
        date,
        dailyPath,
        dailyCheckPath,
        selectedTopic,
        masteryNote,
        projectPath,
        sourceNotes,
        candidateNodes,
        originTrack: normalizeNullable(flags['origin-track']) || 'Discovery',
        focusQuestion: normalizeNullable(flags.question) || `Why does ${selectedTopic} deserve its own knowledge node?`,
      }),
      force,
      summary,
      'Wildcard'
    );

    if (topicId) {
      const existingKnowledgeCheck = await findExistingKnowledgeCheck(date, topicId);
      const knowledgeCheckPath = existingKnowledgeCheck || join(
        CHECKS_DIR,
        `${date} ${sanitizeFilenameSegment(masteryNote?.title || selectedTopic, { keepSpaces: true })} Knowledge Check.md`
      );
      ensureNote(
        knowledgeCheckPath,
        buildKnowledgeCheckNote({
          date,
          topicId,
          dailyPath,
          wildcardPath,
          masteryNote,
          projectPath,
          sourceNotes,
          selectedTopic,
        }),
        force,
        summary,
        'Knowledge check'
      );
    } else {
      summary.warnings.push('No --topic-id provided, so no knowledge check was scaffolded.');
    }
  }

  if (weeklyReview) {
    const weeklyPath = join(REVIEWS_DIR, `${date} Weekly Review.md`);
    ensureNote(
      weeklyPath,
      buildWeeklyReviewNote({ date, projectPath, eventDomains, discoveryTopics }),
      force,
      summary,
      'Weekly review'
    );
  }

  printSummary(summary, { dailyPath, selectedTopic, topicId });
  return summary;
}

async function ensureDailyNote(filePath, date, force, summary) {
  if (!force && existsSync(filePath)) {
    summary.skipped.push(`Daily note already exists: ${toVaultRelative(filePath)}`);
    return readNote(filePath);
  }

  const templatePath = join(TEMPLATES_DIR, 'Daily_Understanding.md');
  writeNote(filePath, materializeTemplate(templatePath, date));
  summary.created.push(`Daily note: ${toVaultRelative(filePath)}`);
  return readNote(filePath);
}

function ensureNote(filePath, content, force, summary, label) {
  if (!force && existsSync(filePath)) {
    summary.skipped.push(`${label} already exists: ${toVaultRelative(filePath)}`);
    return false;
  }
  writeNote(filePath, content);
  summary.created.push(`${label}: ${toVaultRelative(filePath)}`);
  return true;
}

function buildDailyCheckNote({ date, dailyPath, discoveryTopics, candidateNodes, sourceNotes, systemConcepts }) {
  const wildcardCandidates = discoveryTopics.slice(0, 3);

function printSummary(summary, context) {
  console.log('\nLearning Session Scaffold');
  console.log('========================');
  console.log(`Date: ${summary.date}`);
  console.log(`Daily note: ${toVaultRelative(context.dailyPath)}`);
  if (context.selectedTopic) console.log(`Selected wildcard topic: ${context.selectedTopic}`);
  if (context.topicId) console.log(`Mastery topic: ${context.topicId}`);

  if (summary.created.length) {
    console.log('\nCreated:');
    for (const item of summary.created) console.log(`  - ${item}`);
  }

  if (summary.skipped.length) {
    console.log('\nSkipped:');
    for (const item of summary.skipped) console.log(`  - ${item}`);
  }

  if (summary.warnings.length) {
    console.log('\nWarnings:');
    for (const item of summary.warnings) console.log(`  - ${item}`);
  }

  console.log('\nNext: complete the daily check, pick the wildcard, then answer at least one knowledge check.');
}

function materializeTemplate(templatePath, date) {
  return readFileSync(templatePath, 'utf-8').replace(/\{\{date\}\}/g, date);
}

async function findMasteryByTopicId(topicId) {
  const notes = await readFolder(MASTERY_DIR, false);
  for (const note of notes) {
    if (String(note?.data?.topic_id || '').trim() !== topicId) continue;
    return {
      path: note.path,
      title: basename(note.filename, '.md'),
      data: note.data,
    };
  }
  return null;
}

async function findExistingWildcard(date, selectedTopic) {
  const notes = await readFolder(WILDCARDS_DIR, false);
  for (const note of notes) {
    if (String(note?.data?.date || '').trim() !== date) continue;
    if (String(note?.data?.selected_topic || '').trim() !== selectedTopic) continue;
    return note.path;
  }
  return null;
}

async function findExistingKnowledgeCheck(date, topicId) {
  const notes = await readFolder(CHECKS_DIR, false);
  for (const note of notes) {
    if (String(note?.data?.date || '').trim() !== date) continue;
    if (String(note?.data?.check_type || '').trim() !== 'knowledge') continue;
    if (String(note?.data?.topic_id || '').trim() !== topicId) continue;
    return note.path;
  }
  return null;
}

function pickSelectedTopic(flags, discoveryTopics) {
  const explicit = normalizeNullable(flags['wildcard-topic']) || normalizeNullable(flags.topic);
  if (explicit) return explicit;

  if (flags.candidate) {
    const index = Number(flags.candidate);
    if (Number.isInteger(index) && index >= 1 && index <= discoveryTopics.length) {
      return discoveryTopics[index - 1];
    }
  }

  return null;
}

function inferProjectName(selectedTopic, masteryNote) {
  if (masteryNote?.title) return masteryNote.title;
  return selectedTopic;
}

function wikiLink(filePath) {
  return `[[${toVaultRelative(filePath).replace(/\.md$/i, '')}]]`;
}

function toVaultRelative(filePath) {
  if (filePath.startsWith(LEARNING_VAULT_ROOT)) {
    return relative(LEARNING_VAULT_ROOT, filePath).split(sep).join('/');
  }
  return relative(VAULT_ROOT, filePath).split(sep).join('/');
}

function toArray(value) {
  if (Array.isArray(value)) return value.filter(Boolean).map(v => String(v).trim()).filter(Boolean);
  if (value === null || value === undefined) return [];
  const raw = String(value).trim();
  if (!raw) return [];
  return raw.split(',').map(part => part.trim()).filter(Boolean);
}

function joinLinks(items) {
  return items.join(', ');
}

function normalizeNullable(value) {
  if (value === null || value === undefined) return null;
  const text = String(value).trim();
  return text || null;
}

function extractInlineField(content, fieldName) {
  if (!content) return null;
  const match = content.match(new RegExp(`^${fieldName}::\\s*(.+)$`, 'm'));
  return match ? match[1].trim() : null;
}

function sanitizeFilenameSegment(value, options = {}) {
  const { keepSpaces = false } = options;
  const normalized = String(value)
    .replace(/[<>:"/\\|?*]+/g, ' ')
    .replace(/\s+/g, keepSpaces ? ' ' : '_')
    .replace(/_+/g, '_')
    .trim();
  return normalized || 'Untitled';
}

import { existsSync, readFileSync } from 'fs';
import { resolve, join, relative, sep, basename } from 'path';
import { getLearningVaultRoot, getLearningRoot } from './lib/config.mjs';
import { readFolder, readNote } from './lib/frontmatter.mjs';
import { buildFrontmatter, writeNote, today as todayString } from './lib/markdown.mjs';

const SCRIPTS_DIR = import.meta.dirname;
const VAULT_ROOT = resolve(SCRIPTS_DIR, '..');
const LEARNING_VAULT_ROOT = getLearningVaultRoot();
const LEARNING_ROOT = getLearningRoot();
const DAILY_DIR = join(LEARNING_ROOT, '01_Daily');
const CHECKS_DIR = join(LEARNING_ROOT, '02_Checks');
const WILDCARDS_DIR = join(LEARNING_ROOT, '03_Wildcards');
const MASTERY_DIR = join(LEARNING_ROOT, '05_Mastery');
const TEMPLATES_DIR = join(LEARNING_ROOT, '06_Templates');
const PROJECTS_DIR = join(LEARNING_ROOT, '07_Projects');
const REVIEWS_DIR = join(LEARNING_ROOT, '08_Reviews');

export async function run(flags = {}) {
  const date = String(flags.date || todayString()).trim();
  const force = Boolean(flags.force);
  const weeklyReview = Boolean(flags['weekly-review']);
  const summary = { date, created: [], skipped: [], warnings: [] };

  const dailyPath = join(DAILY_DIR, `${date}.md`);
  const dailyNote = await ensureDailyNote(dailyPath, date, force, summary);
  const dailyData = dailyNote?.data || {};

  const discoveryTopics = toArray(dailyData.discovery_topics);
  const candidateNodes = toArray(dailyData.candidate_nodes);
  const sourceNotes = toArray(dailyData.source_notes);
  const systemConcepts = toArray(dailyData.system_concepts);
  const eventDomains = toArray(dailyData.event_domains);
  const clarityScore = Number(dailyData.clarity_score || extractInlineField(dailyNote?.content, 'clarity_score') || 0);

  const dailyCheckPath = join(CHECKS_DIR, `${date} Daily Check.md`);
  ensureNote(
    dailyCheckPath,
    buildDailyCheckNote({ date, dailyPath, discoveryTopics, candidateNodes, sourceNotes, systemConcepts }),
    force,
    summary,
    'Daily check'
  );

  const selectedTopic = pickSelectedTopic(flags, discoveryTopics);
  const topicId = normalizeNullable(flags['topic-id']);
  const masteryNote = topicId ? await findMasteryByTopicId(topicId) : null;
  const projectName = normalizeNullable(flags.project);

  if ((flags.candidate || flags.topic || flags['wildcard-topic']) && clarityScore < 2) {
    summary.warnings.push(`Daily note clarity score is ${clarityScore}; wildcard scaffolding usually waits for clarity >= 2.`);
  }

  let wildcardPath = null;
  let projectPath = null;

  if (selectedTopic) {
    const existingWildcard = await findExistingWildcard(date, selectedTopic);
    wildcardPath = existingWildcard || join(WILDCARDS_DIR, `${date} ${sanitizeFilenameSegment(selectedTopic, { keepSpaces: true })} Wildcard.md`);

    const projectTitle = projectName || inferProjectName(selectedTopic, masteryNote);
    if (projectTitle) {
      projectPath = join(PROJECTS_DIR, `${sanitizeFilenameSegment(projectTitle, { keepSpaces: true })}.md`);
      ensureNote(
        projectPath,
        buildProjectNote({
          date,
          projectTitle,
          wildcardPath,
          masteryNote,
          selectedTopic,
          sourceNotes,
          eventDomains,
          candidateNodes,
        }),
        force,
        summary,
        'Depth project'
      );
    }

    ensureNote(
      wildcardPath,
      buildWildcardNote({
        date,
        dailyPath,
        dailyCheckPath,
        selectedTopic,
        masteryNote,
        projectPath,
        sourceNotes,
        candidateNodes,
        originTrack: normalizeNullable(flags['origin-track']) || 'Discovery',
        focusQuestion: normalizeNullable(flags.question) || `Why does ${selectedTopic} deserve its own knowledge node?`,
      }),
      force,
      summary,
      'Wildcard'
    );

    if (topicId) {
      const existingKnowledgeCheck = await findExistingKnowledgeCheck(date, topicId);
      const knowledgeCheckPath = existingKnowledgeCheck || join(
        CHECKS_DIR,
        `${date} ${sanitizeFilenameSegment(masteryNote?.title || selectedTopic, { keepSpaces: true })} Knowledge Check.md`
      );
      ensureNote(
        knowledgeCheckPath,
        buildKnowledgeCheckNote({
          date,
          topicId,
          dailyPath,
          wildcardPath,
          masteryNote,
          projectPath,
          sourceNotes,
          selectedTopic,
        }),
        force,
        summary,
        'Knowledge check'
      );
    } else {
      summary.warnings.push('No --topic-id provided, so no knowledge check was scaffolded.');
    }
  }

  if (weeklyReview) {
    const weeklyPath = join(REVIEWS_DIR, `${date} Weekly Review.md`);
    ensureNote(
      weeklyPath,
      buildWeeklyReviewNote({ date, projectPath, eventDomains, discoveryTopics }),
      force,
      summary,
      'Weekly review'
    );
  }

  printSummary(summary, { dailyPath, selectedTopic, topicId });
  return summary;
}

async function ensureDailyNote(filePath, date, force, summary) {
  if (!force && existsSync(filePath)) {
    summary.skipped.push(`Daily note already exists: ${toVaultRelative(filePath)}`);
    return readNote(filePath);
  }

  const templatePath = join(TEMPLATES_DIR, 'Daily_Understanding.md');
  writeNote(filePath, materializeTemplate(templatePath, date));
  summary.created.push(`Daily note: ${toVaultRelative(filePath)}`);
  return readNote(filePath);
}

function ensureNote(filePath, content, force, summary, label) {
  if (!force && existsSync(filePath)) {
    summary.skipped.push(`${label} already exists: ${toVaultRelative(filePath)}`);
    return false;
  }
  writeNote(filePath, content);
  summary.created.push(`${label}: ${toVaultRelative(filePath)}`);
  return true;
}

  console.log('\nLearning Session Scaffold');
  console.log('========================');
  console.log(`Date: ${summary.date}`);
  console.log(`Daily note: ${toVaultRelative(context.dailyPath)}`);
  if (context.selectedTopic) console.log(`Selected wildcard topic: ${context.selectedTopic}`);
  if (context.topicId) console.log(`Mastery topic: ${context.topicId}`);

  if (summary.created.length) {
    console.log('\nCreated:');
    for (const item of summary.created) console.log(`  - ${item}`);
  }

  if (summary.skipped.length) {
    console.log('\nSkipped:');
    for (const item of summary.skipped) console.log(`  - ${item}`);
  }

  if (summary.warnings.length) {
    console.log('\nWarnings:');
    for (const item of summary.warnings) console.log(`  - ${item}`);
  }

  console.log('\nNext: complete the daily check, pick the wildcard, then answer at least one knowledge check.');
}

function materializeTemplate(templatePath, date) {
  return readFileSync(templatePath, 'utf-8').replace(/\{\{date\}\}/g, date);
}

async function findMasteryByTopicId(topicId) {
  const notes = await readFolder(MASTERY_DIR, false);
  for (const note of notes) {
    if (String(note?.data?.topic_id || '').trim() !== topicId) continue;
    return {
      path: note.path,
      title: basename(note.filename, '.md'),
      data: note.data,
    };
  }
  return null;
}

async function findExistingWildcard(date, selectedTopic) {
  const notes = await readFolder(WILDCARDS_DIR, false);
  for (const note of notes) {
    if (String(note?.data?.date || '').trim() !== date) continue;
    if (String(note?.data?.selected_topic || '').trim() !== selectedTopic) continue;
    return note.path;
  }
  return null;
}

async function findExistingKnowledgeCheck(date, topicId) {
  const notes = await readFolder(CHECKS_DIR, false);
  for (const note of notes) {
    if (String(note?.data?.date || '').trim() !== date) continue;
    if (String(note?.data?.check_type || '').trim() !== 'knowledge') continue;
    if (String(note?.data?.topic_id || '').trim() !== topicId) continue;
    return note.path;
  }
  return null;
}

function pickSelectedTopic(flags, discoveryTopics) {
  const explicit = normalizeNullable(flags['wildcard-topic']) || normalizeNullable(flags.topic);
  if (explicit) return explicit;

  if (flags.candidate) {
    const index = Number(flags.candidate);
    if (Number.isInteger(index) && index >= 1 && index <= discoveryTopics.length) {
      return discoveryTopics[index - 1];
    }
  }

  return null;
}

function inferProjectName(selectedTopic, masteryNote) {
  if (masteryNote?.title) return masteryNote.title;
  return selectedTopic;
}

function wikiLink(filePath) {
  return `[[${toVaultRelative(filePath).replace(/\.md$/i, '')}]]`;
}

function toVaultRelative(filePath) {
  return relative(VAULT_ROOT, filePath).split(sep).join('/');
}

function toArray(value) {
  if (Array.isArray(value)) return value.filter(Boolean).map(v => String(v).trim()).filter(Boolean);
  if (value === null || value === undefined) return [];
  const raw = String(value).trim();
  if (!raw) return [];
  return raw.split(',').map(part => part.trim()).filter(Boolean);
}

function joinLinks(items) {
  return items.join(', ');
}

function normalizeNullable(value) {
  if (value === null || value === undefined) return null;
  const text = String(value).trim();
  return text || null;
}

function extractInlineField(content, fieldName) {
  if (!content) return null;
  const match = content.match(new RegExp(`^${fieldName}::\\s*(.+)$`, 'm'));
  return match ? match[1].trim() : null;
}

function sanitizeFilenameSegment(value, options = {}) {
  const { keepSpaces = false } = options;
  const normalized = String(value)
    .replace(/[<>:"/\\|?*]+/g, ' ')
    .replace(/\s+/g, keepSpaces ? ' ' : '_')
    .replace(/_+/g, '_')
    .trim();
  return normalized || 'Untitled';
}

# Plan to Move Scripts to Learning Vault

This plan outlines the steps required to move the existing project scripts and Node.js server into the `Learning_Vault` while ensuring they still utilize the `.env` API keys stored in `My_Data`.

## 1. Move Scripts and Dependencies
Move the entire `scripts` directory and Node.js package configurations from the main vault to the `Learning_Vault`:
- Move `My_Data/scripts` -> `Learning_Vault/scripts`
- Move `My_Data/package.json` -> `Learning_Vault/package.json`
- Move `My_Data/package-lock.json` -> `Learning_Vault/package-lock.json`

## 2. Update Configuration to Use My_Data API Keys
Update the newly moved `Learning_Vault/scripts/lib/config.mjs` so it loads the `.env` file from the original `My_Data` vault, ensuring no API keys need to be duplicated.

```javascript
const VAULT_ROOT = resolve(__dirname, '..', '..');
const MY_DATA_ROOT = resolve(VAULT_ROOT, '..', 'My_Data');

// Load .env from My_Data root instead of the Learning_Vault root
config({ path: resolve(MY_DATA_ROOT, '.env') });
```

## 3. Set Up Target Directories in Learning Vault
Ensure the data pulls and signals directories (`05_Data_Pulls` and `06_Signals`) are created in the `Learning_Vault` so the relocated pullers store their research output locally to the new vault context.

## 4. Verification
- Validate the new paths in `Learning_Vault/scripts/lib/config.mjs`.
- Execute a test run of `node scripts/run.mjs status` from the `Learning_Vault` to confirm it successfully detects the `My_Data` API keys.
